description: BGBM is the Botanic Garden and Botanical Museum Berlin, part of Freie Universität Berlin, with biodiversity informatics projects and data services. Its public web properties include botanical collection and annotation services, including collector-focused linked-data APIs and a SPARQL endpoint.
summary: bgbm.org exposes public HTTP integration surfaces including the Collector Services REST API and a public CETAF SPARQL query endpoint; an additional NFDI API draft Swagger surface is published but its live spec/auth could not be confirmed.
